t: Cows produce 150 billion gallons of methane per day. Even without fossil fuels, we will exceed our 565 gigatonnes CO2 limit by 2030, all from raising animals.
h: Cows produce 150 billion gallons of methane per day. Even without fossil fuels, we will exceed our 565 gigatonnes CO2 limit by 2030, all from raising animals.
